research_basis: Number sense development (Dehaene, 2009), mathematical reasoning about time and ages (Piaget's cognitive development), temporal concepts in early childhood education (Friedman, 2008), milestone recognition, counting principles (Gelman & Gallistel), understanding sequences and patterns in age progressions, cultural birthday traditions across age groups
